name: sigir-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for SIGIR, the ACM flagship information-retrieval conference: track and topic routing, dual full/short-paper submission audits, IR evaluation and significance-testing rigor, test-collection and artifact packaging, the separate Resources and Reproducibility tracks, review-phase strategy, and ACM TAPS camera-ready production. Grounded in the SIGIR 2026 (49th, Melbourne) cycle pages checked on 2026-07-08.
